_comment: KQL Real-Time Dashboard — IoT / Facility Monitoring
Import this definition into a Fabric Real-Time Dashboard.
Each tile contains a standalone KQL query designed for the
RealtimeIoT table in the tt_eventhouse / tt_kqldb.
name: IoT Monitoring Live

tiles.title: Store Temperature Status
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 2h;
RealtimeIoT
| where SensorType == "Temperature" and ReadingTimestamp > ago(lookback)
| summarize
    AvgTemp = round(avg(ReadingValue), 1),
    MinTemp = round(min(ReadingValue), 1),
    MaxTemp = round(max(ReadingValue), 1)
    by StoreId, bin(ReadingTimestamp, 5m)
| order by ReadingTimestamp asc, StoreId asc

tiles.title: Humidity Alerts
tiles.kql_query:
let humidity_warning = 70.0;
let humidity_critical = 80.0;
RealtimeIoT
| where SensorType == "Humidity"
| summarize arg_max(ReadingTimestamp, *) by DeviceId
| extend AlertLevel = case(
    ReadingValue >= humidity_critical, "critical",
    ReadingValue >= humidity_warning,  "warning",
    ReadingValue < 40.0,               "low",
    "normal"
  )
| where AlertLevel != "normal"
| project
    StoreId,
    DeviceId,
    Humidity = round(ReadingValue, 1),
    LastReading = ReadingTimestamp,
    AlertLevel
| order by case(
    AlertLevel == "critical", 1,
    AlertLevel == "warning",  2,
    AlertLevel == "low",      3,
    4
  ) asc, ReadingValue desc

tiles.title: Energy Consumption Trend
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 24h;
RealtimeIoT
| where SensorType == "Energy" and ReadingTimestamp > ago(lookback)
| extend StoreRegion = substring(StoreId, 0, 4)
| summarize
    AvgEnergy = round(avg(ReadingValue), 1),
    MaxEnergy = round(max(ReadingValue), 1),
    DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId)
    by StoreRegion, bin(ReadingTimestamp, 1h)
| order by ReadingTimestamp asc, StoreRegion asc

tiles.title: Foot Traffic Now vs Yesterday
Equipment Health Score
tiles.kql_query:
let silence_threshold = 15m;
let battery_warning = 20.0;
let zscore_threshold = 3.0;
let sensor_stats =
    RealtimeIoT
    | where ReadingTimestamp > ago(24h)
    | summarize
        MeanValue = avg(ReadingValue),
        StdDevValue = stdev(ReadingValue)
      by SensorType;
let device_status =
    RealtimeIoT
    | summarize arg_max(ReadingTimestamp, *) by DeviceId
    | join kind=leftouter sensor_stats on SensorType
    | extend ZScore = iff(
        StdDevValue > 0,
        abs(ReadingValue - MeanValue) / StdDevValue,
        0.0
      )
    | extend Status = case(
        (now() - ReadingTimestamp) > silence_threshold, "offline",
        BatteryLevel < battery_warning and ZScore > zscore_threshold, "critical",
        ZScore > zscore_threshold, "critical",
        BatteryLevel < battery_warning, "warning",
        IsAnomaly == true, "warning",
        "healthy"
      );
device_status
| summarize
    TotalDevices = dcount(DeviceId),
    HealthyDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, Status == "healthy"),
    WarningDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, Status == "warning"),
    CriticalDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, Status == "critical"),
    OfflineDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, Status == "offline")
    by StoreId
| extend HealthScore = round(100.0 * HealthyDevices / TotalDevices, 1)
| project StoreId, HealthScore, TotalDevices, HealthyDevices, WarningDevices, CriticalDevices, OfflineDevices
| order by HealthScore asc

tiles.title: Sensor Offline Count
tiles.kql_query:
let silence_threshold = 15m;
let current_offline =
    RealtimeIoT
    | summarize LastReport = max(ReadingTimestamp) by DeviceId
    | where (now() - LastReport) > silence_threshold
    | count
    | project OfflineNow = Count;
let previous_offline =
    RealtimeIoT
    | where ReadingTimestamp < ago(1h)
    | summarize LastReport = max(ReadingTimestamp) by DeviceId
    | where (ago(1h) - LastReport) > silence_threshold
    | count
    | project OfflinePrevious = Count;
current_offline
| extend dummy = 1
| join kind=leftouter (previous_offline | extend dummy = 1) on dummy
| extend
    OfflineNow = OfflineNow,
    OfflinePrevious = coalesce(OfflinePrevious, 0),
    Trend = case(
        OfflineNow > coalesce(OfflinePrevious, 0), "increasing",
        OfflineNow < coalesce(OfflinePrevious, 0), "decreasing",
        "stable"
    ),
    Delta = OfflineNow - coalesce(OfflinePrevious, 0)
| project OfflineNow, OfflinePrevious, Delta, Trend
